title: Teleport Ring
description: This mods adds a Teleportation Ring that can be used to store ender pearls for teleporting
body:
# Teleport Ring

An easier and more compact way to store **Ender pearls** for use of teleporting

### How to use the mod
Right-click anywhere with the ring in your main hand to throw an Ender pearl, if you have any stored in your ring.

### Filling the ring
If you have ender pearls in your inventory you can sneak + right click the ring to add 1 pearl at a time to your ring. **Warning: You can't take the pearls back from the ring!**

### Enchantment
You can enchant the ring with *infinity*, and it will work similar to bows/crossbows. You need just 1 ender pearl in your ring and you can teleport without limits


### Planned features
- Make the ring breakable (either regularly or when enchanted)
- Use of XP when teleporting (in a tiny amount)
